turns.question: So, any plans for the weekend, Samantha?
turns.questionKo: 그래서, 샤만다 이번 주말에 계획 있어요?
turns.answer: I'm actually visiting my grandparents this time.

turns.question: Oh nice, how long will you stay?
turns.answer: Just for two nights, then I'm back Sunday evening.

turns.question: That sounds nice. Can you bring them my regards?
turns.answer: Of course, they'll love hearing that.

turns.question: Enjoy your weekend! By the way, what phone do you have these days?
turns.questionKo: 주말 잘 보내요! 근데 요즘 무슨 폰 써요?
turns.answer: I actually just got the latest iPhone, funny enough.
turns.answerKo: 사실 얼마 전에 최신 아이폰 샀어요, 신기하게도.

turns.question: Oh nice, how long does the battery last on that one?
turns.answer: Pretty much all day if I'm not gaming on it.
turns.answerKo: 게임만 안 하면 거의 하루 종일 가요.

turns.question: Not bad. Isn't it expensive, though?
turns.answer: It was, honestly, but my old one finally gave out.
turns.answerKo: 솔직히 비싸긴 했는데, 예전 폰이 결국 완전히 맛이 갔어요.

turns.question: Fair enough. Does it have a good camera at least?
turns.answer: Actually yeah, it's probably the best camera I've had.
turns.answerKo: 네 사실 지금까지 써본 것 중에 카메라가 제일 좋아요.

turns.question: Nice, that's good to hear -- have a great trip this weekend.
turns.questionKo: 좋네요, 다행이다. 이번 주말 여행 잘 다녀와요.
turns.answer: Thanks, I will -- talk to you when I'm back.
